name: Telegram bot UX polish: edit messages, natural expense input, compact preview
description: Bot message hygiene (edit instead of new bubble for /settings, contextual buttons in /stats /top /budget), natural expense input in private chats (no /ai prefix required) via Vietnamese amount detector, compact expense preview with 'Chi tiết' expansion, top categories progress bar.

planned: Inline plan: 3 features (message hygiene, natural VN amount input, compact preview + top categories bar). Out of scope: undo, auto-save. User decisions: private-chat-only natural input; xxx000 = nghìn VND; contextual buttons replace generic Mở Mini App for linked user.
done: TelegramClient.editMessageText + editMessageReplyMarkup added; same throw-on-error pattern.
BotResponse extended with mode: 'send'|'edit' + targetMessageId; callback dispatch routes edit to editMessageText.
/settings callback uses editMessageText on the same message (no new bubble).
/stats /top /budget use contextual keyboards (statsKeyboard/topKeyboard/budgetKeyboard) for linked user; unlinked still uses openAppKeyboard.

vn-amount-detector.ts: pure functions detectAmountInVnd + looksLikeExpense. Patterns: 30k, 1tr, 1tr5, 1 triệu, 1 củ, 1 lít, 5 xị, 20 nghìn, 100.000, trailing-000 ≥1000. Rejects income words, <1000, >12 digits, ambiguous 00 endings.
Natural input path in service.ts: private chat + linked user + amount pattern → reuse /ai draft/confirm flow with detected amount overriding AI. No auto-save.
ai-expense.ts: extracted buildDraftFromItem + exported computeDedupeKey; both /ai and natural input use it. handleDetailExpense added for 'detail:' callback.

finance-text.ts: renderExpensePreviewText({compact}) shows amount/category/title only. renderProgressBar(percent, width=16) returns ▓...▓░...░. renderTopCategoriesText renders progress bar per category.
keyboards.ts: expensePreviewCompactKeyboard (✅ Lưu / 📋 Chi tiết / 🏠 Household / ❌ Hủy), expensePreviewFullKeyboard (renamed from old), statsKeyboard/topKeyboard/budgetKeyboard.
household-select.ts: updated to use expensePreviewFullKeyboard rename.
verification: ./init.sh test -> OK (633 tests pass, 103 files; +38 amount detector + 8 finance-text render tests).
All existing ai-expense, confirm-expense, settings, stats, top, budget tests pass unchanged.
Pre-push hook: all source files under 300 lines (max 295).
./init.sh after docs update -> Done! (no code changes, doc-only).

notes: Out of scope per user: undo/revert, auto-save without confirmation. Docs updated to match: spec adds Message Hygiene, Natural Expense Input (Entry form 2), compact preview with Chi tiet expansion, top-categories progress bar, and explicit amount-pattern + edit-vs-send rules. Architecture + folder structure + global docs (ARCHITECTURE.md, README.md, PRODUCT.vi.md, TMA.md, BACKEND.md) now list the bot companion as a first-class surface.
